feature.name: Host Inbox
feature.description: Orchestrates the host event-inquiry inbox across event and general scope, booked and prospective audiences, search, conversation routing, and authorized event broadcasts.

actionScope.included: Host Inbox retry, search, event/general scope, booked/prospective audience selection, conversation routing, and event-broadcast audience, template, composer, and send lifecycle.
excluded: Raw broadcast body edits are form data; the contract cardinalizes template/audience decisions and the send mutation instead of individual keystrokes.
Conversation thread behavior and safety actions retain the shared chat-thread contract.

actions.description: Invalidates the failed identity, conversation, and hosted-organizer sources for the current inbox.
Opens or collapses the inbox search field while preserving non-empty search text.
Filters the selected event or general inquiry rows by participant name.
Selects an event-scoped inbox or the explicit General inquiry scope and synchronizes it to the route.
Switches an event inbox between Booked and Prospective inquiry rows.
Opens the selected host inquiry in the shared chat thread route.
Opens the authorized broadcast composer for a non-empty event audience.
Selects Booked, Prospective, or Everyone and rotates the idempotency request id.
Seeds one reviewed broadcast template and rotates the idempotency request id.
Sends one idempotent event broadcast to the selected roster-derived audience and reports partial push delivery honestly.
